title: HARM REDUCTION - 211info
text: CLATSOP COUNTY PUBLIC SOUTH COUNTY CENTER HARM REDUCTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Conducts a syringe exchange in which participants are provided clean syringes on a one-for one basis (one clean syringe for one used syringe). Naloxone training and kits and other recource referrals are also available at all locations. 1225 Avenue A Seaside, OR 97138 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Seaside: Thursday 11:30am-12:30pm Astoria: Thursday 2pm-3:30pm Email (503) 325-8500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 325-8500 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in to any of these locations: -Clatsop County Public Health Astoria: End of 32nd Street behind Safeway -Seaside: Providence Hospital, 725 S Wahanna Road, in the parking lot FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: Needle Exchange and Injection Supplies Opioid Antidote Distribution Specialized Information and Referral Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLATSOP COUNTY PUBLIC SOUTH COUNTY CENTER
